channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A robotic approach for ventral hernia repair may improve postoperative outcomes
item.description: 1. Robotic component separation for ventral hernia repair was associated with lower postoperative complication rates, shorter length of stay, and fewe...

item.title: Nursing is nearing a breaking point, but one force keeps pulling people in anyway

item.title: Biodegradable, all-metal microrobots could transform drug delivery and biopsy procedures

item.title: Pediatricians Prepared to Manage Mood Disorders With SSRI
